reviews.comment:
UNA VERGÜENZA QUE EL ACA NO CONTROLE SUS ESTACIONES DE SERVICIOS. NUNCA ENCONTRE UNA SUCIEDAD TAL EN OTRA ESTACION DE SERVICIO. UN DESASTRE!!!! POR FAVOR NO PAREN EN ESE LUGAR. SE VAN A ARREPENTIR !!!!

(Translated by Google)
It's a disgrace that the ACA (Mexican Automobile Association) doesn't inspect its service stations. I've never seen such filth at any other service station. A disaster! Please don't stop there. You'll regret it!

reviews.comment:
muy buen lugar para alojarse de paso. Muy buenas las habitaciones. No hubo comida cuando llegamos a la noche, ni siquiera a la mañana para tomar un café. Es una lástima ya que muchos de los pasajeros toman la ruta y es necesario que haya algo para comer o beber

(Translated by Google)
A very good place to stay while passing through. The rooms are very nice. There was no food available when we arrived at night, nor even coffee in the morning. It's a shame, as many passengers take the route and it's essential to have something to eat or drink.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURVbzd1Wld3EAE
